data.name: kirha
data.description: Primary Kirha Search API summarization model, optimized for high-quality, context-aware responses. Supports unified language endpoints through Kirha Search auto mode, explicit plan creation, and stateless plan execution reuse.

data.name: kirha-flash
data.description: Faster Kirha Search API summarization model for low-latency and high-throughput use cases. Supports unified language endpoints through Kirha Search auto mode, explicit plan creation, and stateless plan execution reuse.

data.name: kirha-tasks
data.description: Kirha Tasks API model for asynchronous multi-vertical research tasks with multi-agent validation, automatic retries, task polling, and provider-executed task progress events in unified streaming.
